channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Blocked gully, 19th March
item.description:
Alnwick Road opposite. L 4. Please clear blocked gully

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alnwick Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffit, 19th March
item.description:
Alnwick Road on bollard opposite no 4. Remove hraffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alnwick Road, Eltham

item.title: Litter bin, 19th March
item.description:
Alnwick Road by bus stop Opposite Horn Pupe schhol

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alnwick Road, Eltham

item.title: Blocked Drain, 19th March
item.description:
Paxton Crescent junction of Alnwick Road Clear blocked gulky

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paston Crescent, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fencing left by team dropping kerb, 19th March
item.description:
Fencing left by team who was dropping kerb. It's already more than a week when it's not been removed. It's obstructing parking spaces and causing hazard when falling over on street when windy, it will cause traffic accident and council will be liable for damages, injuries caused as it been reported on couple occasions without results.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 238, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 19th March
item.description:
Alnwick Road junction of Mottingham Lane Remove flypostering from post (2)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 500mm square 125mm deep pothole on junction where exit from ambulance station is., 19th March
item.description:
Pothole deep enough to be a hazard to motorcycle paramedics leaving station and cause damage to our vehicles. (Bill on its way to you by the way.)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 220, Waterloo Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 19th March
item.description:
Alnwick Road junction oh Mottingham Lane. Remove flypostering from Post (1)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Argo House Block C, 19th March
item.description:
This is an example of pot holes along Kilburn Park Road outside of the Argo House Development and residential properties on the other side of the road and it has become so acute that the vibrations can be felt right throughout the development and it prevents residents from sleeping at night particularly when buses and heavy vehicles pass by.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 19th March
item.description:
Outside no 67 Winn Road Please clear wooden unit from pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winn Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of pallett and mattresses, 19th March
item.description:
Two mattresses against bike hangar opp number 48, wooden pallett outside number 26 - both since beginning of week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lavers Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wide variety of rubbish being burnt at this location., 19th March
item.description:
Heavy accumulation of rubbish at this location being burnt by unknown person or people, smoke affecting local residents. Untaxed vehicles appear abandoned and loaded with rubbish and tyres which are also being used as fuel for fires. Local residents report that this issue has been going on for the past few days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queens Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 Oxford road, 19th March
item.description:
Junk and rubbish left on the street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oxford Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Foul smelling water leaking onto street 100A Queens Crescent (Weedington Rd), 19th March
item.description:
Foul smelling water has been flowing out of this property and down the gutter on Weedington Road since around mid February. Thames water previously informed (22nd Feb) and attended, but don't appear to have solved the problem. The leak is from a private property onto the street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 156-158, Weedington Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffitied around the state, 19th March
item.description:
Both sides of the wall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public Litter Bin?, 19th March
item.description:
Is there any chance of getting a public litter bin along this section of Bromley Road? Mainly at either one of these bus stops between Wickham Road Junction and Chancery Lane Junction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Bromley Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the wall, 19th March
item.description:
Graffiti on the wall. Visible

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8-33, Glenfinlas Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lightning not on Limes walk, 19th March
item.description:
Residential lights are out on Limes Walk walkway and car park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Limes Walk, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet and printer dumped, 19th March
item.description:
Carpet was dumped in the gardens and then moved to the front but still has not been picked up. Printer also left outside but broken so not usable by any ody.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black Bin Bags, 19th March
item.description:
Multiple full black bin bags left by the green cabinet at this location, yet again. Is this a designated spot for the shops to leave bin bags? Either its that or residents are abusing this spot with their own waste. Judging by the contents (seen because of foxes tearing them open), I'm guessing the latter. Could you put up a sign/warning about flytipping around this location?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Drive, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
